records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Facilitated (f*sl"*tā`td); p. pr. & vb. n. Facilitating (f*sl"*tā`tng).]

defs: To make easy or less difficult; to free from difficulty or impediment; to lessen the labor of; as, to facilitate the execution of a task.
quotes: To invite and facilitate that line of proceeding which the times call for.
